data.name: UnexpectedEndOfInput
data.value: Unexpected end of YAML input at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: InvalidIndentation
data.value: Invalid indentation at line {0}, column {1}. Tabs are not allowed for indentation in YAML.

data.name: DuplicateKey
data.value: Duplicate mapping key at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: MultipleDocumentsNotAllowed
data.value: Multiple documents found but single-document mode is configured. Use YamlDocumentMode.MultiAsArray to allow multiple documents.

data.name: InvalidEscapeSequence
data.value: Invalid escape sequence '\\{0}' in double-quoted scalar at line {1}, column {2}.

data.name: UnterminatedDoubleQuotedScalar
data.value: Unterminated double-quoted scalar starting at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: UnterminatedSingleQuotedScalar
data.value: Unterminated single-quoted scalar starting at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: UnterminatedFlowSequence
data.value: Unterminated flow sequence starting at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: UnterminatedFlowMapping
data.value: Unterminated flow mapping starting at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: MaxNestingDepthExceeded
data.value: Maximum nesting depth of {0} exceeded at line {1}, column {2}.

data.name: AliasExpansionDepthExceeded
data.value: Alias expansion depth limit of {0} exceeded. This may indicate a circular or deeply nested anchor/alias structure.

data.name: AliasExpansionSizeExceeded
data.value: Alias expansion size limit of {0} nodes exceeded. This may indicate a billion-laughs attack.

data.name: UndefinedAlias
data.value: Undefined alias '*{0}' at line {1}, column {2}.

data.name: InvalidAnchorName
data.value: Invalid anchor name at line {0}, column {1}. Anchor names must contain at least one character.

data.name: InvalidTagHandle
data.value: Invalid tag handle at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: InvalidBlockScalarHeader
data.value: Invalid block scalar header at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: ExpectedMappingValue
data.value: Expected mapping value after key at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: InvalidUtf8
data.value: Invalid UTF-8 byte sequence at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: UnexpectedCharacter
data.value: Unexpected character '{0}' at line {1}, column {2}.

data.name: InvalidDirective
data.value: Invalid directive at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: ComplexKeysNotSupported
data.value: Complex (non-scalar) mapping keys are not supported in JSON conversion at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: DuplicateYamlDirective
data.value: Duplicate %YAML directive at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: DirectiveWithoutDocumentStart
data.value: Directives must be followed by a document start marker (---) at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: TabInIndentation
data.value: Tabs are not allowed for indentation in YAML at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: TrailingContentAfterNode
data.value: Unexpected content after node at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: InvalidFlowSequenceEntry
data.value: Invalid flow sequence entry at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: MissingFlowSeparator
data.value: Missing comma separator in flow collection at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: MultipleAnchors
data.value: A node may have at most one anchor at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: ContentAfterDocumentEndMarker
data.value: Unexpected content after document end marker (...) at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: ContentOnDocumentStartLine
data.value: Content is not allowed on the same line as the document start marker (---) at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: CommentMustBePreceededByWhitespace
data.value: A comment (#) must be preceded by whitespace at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: MultilineImplicitKeyNotAllowed
data.value: Implicit mapping keys must not span multiple lines at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: BlockCollectionOnSameLine
data.value: A block collection must not appear on the same line as an implicit mapping value at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: FlowContentUnderindented
data.value: Flow content continuation line is under-indented at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: DuplicateAnchor
data.value: A node must not have more than one anchor at line {0}, column {1}.

data.name: AliasCannotHaveProperties
data.value: An alias node must not have an anchor or tag at line {0}, column {1}.
